info.title: Apizr dedicated version of NSwag command line tool for Net70, toolchain

arguments.name: REGISTRATIONTYPE
arguments.description: Generate a registration helper class (None, Static, Extended or Both)

arguments.name: WITHPRIORITY
arguments.description: Add a Priority parameter into Get methods

arguments.name: WITHRETRY
arguments.description: Add retry management

arguments.name: WITHLOGS
arguments.description: Add logs

arguments.name: WITHREQUESTOPTIONS
arguments.description: Add Request Options

arguments.name: WITHCACHEPROVIDER
arguments.description: Add cache management (None, Akavache, MonkeyCache, InMemory, Distributed or Custom)

arguments.name: WITHMEDIATION
arguments.description: Add MediatR

arguments.name: WITHOPTIONALMEDIATION
arguments.description: Add Optional.Async

arguments.name: WITHMAPPING
arguments.description: Add data mapping (None, AutoMapper, Mapster or Custom

arguments.name: CLASSNAME
arguments.description: The class name of the generated client.

arguments.name: OPERATIONGENERATIONMODE
arguments.description: The operation generation mode ('SingleClientFromOperationId' or 'MultipleClientsFromPathSegments').

arguments.name: ADDITIONALNAMESPACEUSAGES
arguments.description: The additional namespace usages.

arguments.name: ADDITIONALCONTRACTNAMESPACEUSAGES
arguments.description: The additional contract namespace usages.

arguments.name: GENERATEOPTIONALPARAMETERS
arguments.description: Specifies whether to reorder parameters (required first, optional at the end) and generate optional parameters (default: false).

arguments.name: GENERATEJSONMETHODS
arguments.description: Specifies whether to render ToJson() and FromJson() methods for DTOs (default: true).

arguments.name: ENFORCEFLAGENUMS
arguments.description: Specifies whether enums should be always generated as bit flags (default: false).

arguments.name: PARAMETERARRAYTYPE
arguments.description: The generic array .NET type of operation parameters (default: 'IEnumerable').

arguments.name: PARAMETERDICTIONARYTYPE
arguments.description: The generic dictionary .NET type of operation parameters (default: 'IDictionary').

arguments.name: RESPONSEARRAYTYPE
arguments.description: The generic array .NET type of operation responses (default: 'ICollection').

arguments.name: RESPONSEDICTIONARYTYPE
arguments.description: The generic dictionary .NET type of operation responses (default: 'IDictionary').

arguments.name: WRAPRESPONSES
arguments.description: Specifies whether to wrap success responses to allow full response access.

arguments.name: WRAPRESPONSEMETHODS
arguments.description: List of methods where responses are wrapped ('ControllerName.MethodName', WrapResponses must be true).

arguments.name: GENERATERESPONSECLASSES
arguments.description: Specifies whether to generate response classes (default: true).

arguments.name: RESPONSECLASS
arguments.description: The response class (default 'SwaggerResponse', may use '{controller}' placeholder).

arguments.name: NAMESPACE
arguments.description: The namespace of the generated classes.

arguments.name: REQUIREDPROPERTIESMUSTBEDEFINED
arguments.description: Specifies whether a required property must be defined in JSON (sets Required.Always when the property is required).

arguments.name: DATETYPE
arguments.description: The date .NET type (default: 'DateTimeOffset').

arguments.name: JSONCONVERTERS
arguments.description: Specifies the custom Json.NET converter types (optional, comma separated).

arguments.name: ANYTYPE
arguments.description: The any .NET type (default: 'object').

arguments.name: DATETIMETYPE
arguments.description: The date time .NET type (default: 'DateTimeOffset').

arguments.name: TIMETYPE
arguments.description: The time .NET type (default: 'TimeSpan').

arguments.name: TIMESPANTYPE
arguments.description: The time span .NET type (default: 'TimeSpan').

arguments.name: ARRAYTYPE
arguments.description: The generic array .NET type (default: 'ICollection').

arguments.name: ARRAYINSTANCETYPE
arguments.description: The generic array .NET instance type (default: empty = ArrayType).

arguments.name: DICTIONARYTYPE
arguments.description: The generic dictionary .NET type (default: 'IDictionary').

arguments.name: DICTIONARYINSTANCETYPE
arguments.description: The generic dictionary .NET instance type (default: empty = DictionaryType).

arguments.name: ARRAYBASETYPE
arguments.description: The generic array .NET type (default: 'Collection').

arguments.name: DICTIONARYBASETYPE
arguments.description: The generic dictionary .NET type (default: 'Dictionary').

arguments.name: CLASSSTYLE
arguments.description: The CSharp class style, 'Poco' or 'Inpc' (default: 'Poco').

arguments.name: JSONLIBRARY
arguments.description: The CSharp JSON library, 'NewtonsoftJson' or 'SystemTextJson' (default: 'NewtonsoftJson', 'SystemTextJson' is experimental).

arguments.name: GENERATEDEFAULTVALUES
arguments.description: Specifies whether to generate default values for properties (may generate CSharp 6 code, default: true).

arguments.name: GENERATEDATAANNOTATIONS
arguments.description: Specifies whether to generate data annotation attributes on DTO classes (default: true).

arguments.name: EXCLUDEDTYPENAMES
arguments.description: The excluded DTO type names (must be defined in an import or other namespace).

arguments.name: EXCLUDEDPARAMETERNAMES
arguments.description: The globally excluded parameter names.

arguments.name: HANDLEREFERENCES
arguments.description: Use preserve references handling (All) in the JSON serializer (default: false).

arguments.name: GENERATEIMMUTABLEARRAYPROPERTIES
arguments.description: Specifies whether to remove the setter for non-nullable array properties (default: false).

arguments.name: GENERATEIMMUTABLEDICTIONARYPROPERTIES
arguments.description: Specifies whether to remove the setter for non-nullable dictionary properties (default: false).

arguments.name: JSONSERIALIZERSETTINGSTRANSFORMATIONMETHOD
arguments.description: The name of a static method which is called to transform the JsonSerializerSettings used in the generated ToJson()/FromJson() methods (default: none).

arguments.name: INLINENAMEDARRAYS
arguments.description: Inline named arrays (default: false).

arguments.name: INLINENAMEDDICTIONARIES
arguments.description: Inline named dictionaries (default: false).

arguments.name: INLINENAMEDTUPLES
arguments.description: Inline named tuples (default: true).

arguments.name: INLINENAMEDANY
arguments.description: Inline named any types (default: false).

arguments.name: GENERATEDTOTYPES
arguments.description: Specifies whether to generate DTO classes.

arguments.name: GENERATEOPTIONALPROPERTIESASNULLABLE
arguments.description: Specifies whether optional schema properties (not required) are generated as nullable properties (default: false).

arguments.name: GENERATENULLABLEREFERENCETYPES
arguments.description: Specifies whether whether to generate Nullable Reference Type annotations (default: false).

arguments.name: TEMPLATEDIRECTORY
arguments.description: The Liquid template directory (experimental).

arguments.name: TYPENAMEGENERATOR
arguments.description: The custom ITypeNameGenerator implementation type in the form 'assemblyName:fullTypeName' or 'fullTypeName').

arguments.name: PROPERTYNAMEGENERATORTYPE
arguments.description: The custom IPropertyNameGenerator implementation type in the form 'assemblyName:fullTypeName' or 'fullTypeName').

arguments.name: ENUMNAMEGENERATORTYPE
arguments.description: The custom IEnumNameGenerator implementation type in the form 'assemblyName:fullTypeName' or 'fullTypeName').

arguments.name: INPUT
arguments.description: A file path or URL to the data or the JSON data itself.

arguments.name: SERVICEHOST
arguments.description: Overrides the service host of the web document (optional, use '.' to remove the hostname).

arguments.name: SERVICESCHEMES
arguments.description: Overrides the allowed schemes of the web service (optional, comma separated, 'http', 'https', 'ws', 'wss').

arguments.name: OUTPUT
arguments.description: The output file path (optional).

arguments.name: NEWLINEBEHAVIOR
arguments.description: The new line behavior (Auto (OS default), CRLF, LF).

commands.name: new
commands.description: Creates a new apizr.json file in the current directory.

commands.name: run
commands.description: Executes an .nswag file. If 'input' is not specified then all *.nswag files and the apizr.json file is executed.

commands.name: swagger2apizr
commands.description: Generates Apizr client code from a Swagger/OpenAPI specification.
